cardiovascular.detail: Monitor LDL-C, HDL-C, triglycerides, and Lp(a).
Mediterranean diet, ≥ 150 min/week moderate exercise, smoking cessation.

cancer.detail: Discuss BRCA, Lynch, and TP53 implications.
Mammography, colonoscopy, PSA, or skin checks as indicated by variant profile.

diabetes.frequency: Annually from age 35 or earlier if high-risk

alzheimers.detail: MoCA or MMSE; discuss emerging amyloid biomarkers.
Cardiovascular risk management, social engagement, physical activity, sleep hygiene.

autoimmune.detail: ANA, RF, anti-CCP, HLA typing as directed by clinician.
CRP, ESR for early detection of flares.

metabolic.detail: Folate-rich diet; prenatal folic acid supplementation for MTHFR carriers.

eye.detail: Early detection of drusen and RPE changes.

neurological.frequency: If symptomatic or family history positive
neurological.detail: DaTscan, genetic counselling for LRRK2 carriers.
Regular aerobic exercise, cognitive engagement, adequate sleep.

bone.detail: Assess fracture risk; consider FRAX calculation.

blood.detail: Monitor ferritin and transferrin saturation for HFE; Hb electrophoresis for HBB.
Carrier screening for partner; discuss reproductive options.

respiratory.detail: Monitor FEV1/FVC ratio; early detection of airflow limitation.
Pharmacotherapy and behavioural counselling; avoid second-hand smoke.
Step-wise therapy; allergen avoidance; inhaler technique review.

kidney.frequency: Annually from age 40 or if high-risk
kidney.detail: Early detection of CKD; monitor albuminuria.
ACE inhibitors/ARBs for proteinuria; strict glycaemic targets if diabetic.

liver.frequency: Annually if metabolic risk factors present
liver.detail: Monitor ALT, AST, GGT; screen for steatosis/fibrosis.
HBsAg, anti-HCV; vaccination for hepatitis B if non-immune.

mental_health.detail: Early identification of depression and anxiety.
CBT, counselling; consider psychiatric referral for mood disorders.

reproductive.detail: FSH, LH, AMH, testosterone; ultrasound for PCOS/endometriosis.
Carrier screening; discuss hereditary risks and reproductive options.

dermatological.detail: Full-body skin check; monitor moles and lesions.
Daily moisturisation for atopic dermatitis; sun protection for vitiligo.

gastrointestinal.frequency: Per clinical indication or national guidelines
gastrointestinal.detail: Evaluate for IBD, Barrett's oesophagus, celiac disease.
Gluten-free diet for celiac; low-FODMAP trial for IBS.

endocrine.frequency: Every 1–2 years if at-risk or symptomatic
endocrine.detail: Screen for hypo/hyperthyroidism; thyroid antibodies if autoimmune suspected.
Cortisol, ACTH, PTH, calcium as clinically indicated.

infectious_susceptibility.detail: Ensure up-to-date HBV, influenza, pneumococcal, COVID-19 vaccinations.
HIV testing, TB screening (Mantoux/IGRA), malaria prophylaxis.

dental.detail: Electric toothbrush, fluoride toothpaste, interdental cleaning.

sleep.detail: Diagnose OSA, narcolepsy, or other sleep disorders.
Consistent schedule, dark/cool room, limit caffeine/alcohol.

aging.detail: Functional status, cognitive screening, fall risk, nutrition.
Stress management, regular exercise, antioxidant-rich diet.

hearing.detail: Ear protection in noisy environments; limit headphone volume.

pain.detail: COMT, OPRM1 genotype to guide analgesic selection and dosing.

pharmacogenomics.detail: CYP2C9, CYP2C19, VKORC1, SLCO1B1 genotyping before relevant drugs.
Consult pharmacogenomic results; adjust doses per CPIC/DPWG guidelines.

cardiac_arrhythmia.frequency: If symptomatic or family history positive
cardiac_arrhythmia.detail: 12-lead ECG; 24-48 hr Holter for arrhythmia detection.
Catheter ablation, ICD, or antiarrhythmic medication.
